sentences.arabic: كَانَ بَيْتُ الْحِكْمَةِ فِي بَغْدَادَ مَرْكَزًا لِلْعِلْمِ وَالْأَدَبِ.
sentences.translation: Kuća mudrosti u Bagdadu bila je centar nauke i književnosti.
sentences.translationEn: The House of Wisdom in Baghdad was a center for science and literature.

sentences.arabic: جَمَعَ الْخُلَفَاءُ الْكُتُبَ مِنْ كُلِّ مَكَانٍ فِي الْعَالَمِ.
sentences.translation: Halife su sakupljale knjige iz svih dijelova svijeta.
sentences.translationEn: Caliphs collected books from everywhere in the world.

sentences.arabic: عَمِلَ الْمُتَرْجِمُونَ عَلَى نَقْلِ الْعُلُومِ إِلَى اللُّغَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Prevodioci su radili na prenošenju nauka na arapski jezik.
sentences.translationEn: Translators worked on transferring sciences into the Arabic language.

sentences.arabic: زَارَ الْعُلَمَاءُ هَذِهِ الْمَكْتَبَةَ لِلدِّرَاسَةِ وَالْبَحْثِ.
sentences.translation: Učenjaci su posjećivali ovu biblioteku radi učenja i istraživanja.
sentences.translationEn: Scholars visited this library for study and research.

sentences.arabic: سَاعَدَ هَذَا الْمَكَانُ فِي تَطْوِيرِ الْحَضَارَةِ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovo mjesto je pomoglo u razvoju islamske civilizacije.
sentences.translationEn: This place helped in the development of Islamic civilization.
